transcript: Speaker A: 90 days. That's how long until August. Where will your English be in 90 days? If you do nothing, same as today. Same fears, same hesitation. If you practice with me 10 minutes a day, that's 900 minutes of speaking practice. That's 150 conversations. That's a completely different level. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. 90 days will pass anyway. The question is, will you use them? Start today. Download Loora. See the difference in 90 days.

summary: An AI avatar named Loora encourages viewers to practice English for 10 minutes a day over the next 90 days to achieve a completely different level of fluency. She highlights that 90 days will pass regardless, urging users to download the Loora app to start practicing today.
